---
title: "Andreas Bogossian"
subtitle: "Machine Learning · Statistics · Operations Research"
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

## Education

**Master of Science — Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence**
Aalto University · 2025–2027
Minor in Operations Research

**Bachelor of Science — Computer Science**
Aalto University · Sep 2023–Jan 2026
Minor in Mathematics

---

## Experience

**Full Stack Developer** · Droppe *(Internship, part-time)*
Sep 2024–May 2025 · Helsinki, Finland

- Optimized data pipeline with caching, reducing query costs by 37×
- Designed a customized analytics schema to surface relevant data for developers
- Built a no-code filtering tool for data visualization
- Presented final product to ~80 course staff and students

**Logistics Assistant** · Viking Line *(Seasonal)*
Jun 2024–Aug 2024 · Finland

- Served customers across three ships in English, Swedish and Finnish

---

## Publications

**Knowledge Graph Enhanced Recommender Systems**
Aaltodoc · Sep 2025
[View publication](https://aaltodoc.aalto.fi/server/api/core/bitstreams/d141fd14-5b38-475d-a149-429aa3f8812b/content)

---

## Projects

**Bachelor's Thesis — Knowledge Graph Enhanced Recommender Systems**
Jul–Aug 2025 · Grade: 5/5
[GitHub](https://github.com/AJBogo9/Bachelor-s-thesis-recommender-systems-)

**Activity Challenge Telegram Bot**
Dec 2025–Jan 2026
A Telegram bot tracking activity competition scores among Aalto university guilds.
[GitHub](https://github.com/AJBogo9/activity-challenge-bot)

---

## Honors & Awards

**Accenture Software Quality Award — Finalist**
Accenture · May 2025
Top 3 of 19 teams, awarded for software implementation quality. Associated with Aalto University.

---

## Volunteering

**Board Member** · Aalto Triathlon Club · Sep 2024–Present

**Sports Committee Board Member** · Tietokilta · Jan 2025–Present

---

## Languages

English · Native or bilingual proficiency

Chinese (Mandarin) · Elementary proficiency

---

## Links

[GitHub](https://github.com/AJBogo9) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bogo9/) · [andreasbogossian.com](https://andreasbogossian.com)
